Why Us

Why PEPTIVEX LABS?

Highest Purity

Every batch HPLC tested. Certificate of Analysis on request.

Fast Delivery

InPost Paczkomaty (PL) & Lockers (UK). Discreet packaging.

Secure Payments

Stripe — cards, BLIK, P24. Full PCI DSS encryption.

Temperature Control

Storage and shipping under controlled conditions.

Scientific Documentation

Detailed descriptions with scientific literature references.

Wide Selection

Regenerative, metabolic, anti-aging peptides and more.

Process

How It Works

01

Choose Peptides

Browse the catalog, compare products and add to cart.

02

Pay Securely

Stripe handles cards, BLIK and Przelewy24. Full encryption.

03

Collect from InPost

Paczkomat in Poland or Locker in UK. Discreet package, 1-3 days.
